name: @agent-memories/mcp
author: Yorick Chan <yorick@gmail.com>
description: Universal AI-agent memory — MCP client for agent-memories server

scripts.build: bun run build:types && bun run build:js && bun run build:skill
scripts.build:js: bun build src/cli.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --minify && printf '#!/usr/bin/env node\n' | cat - dist/cli.js > dist/cli.js.tmp && mv dist/cli.js.tmp dist/cli.js
scripts.build:skill: cp SKILL.md dist/ && cp -r references/ dist/references/
scripts.test: echo 'Tests need import path updates for monorepo'
